title: Creamy Vialone Risotto
description: A traditional Italian risotto dish made with Vialone rice, creamy sauce, and a touch of buttery goodness.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Vialone rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the white wine and cook until absorbed, stirring constantly.
Add 1 cup of the chicken broth and cook, stirring constantly, until absorbed.
Repeat the process, adding the broth in 1-cup increments, until the rice is cooked and creamy.
Stir in the grated cheese and cook until melted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
